fullArticle:
Digital pre-orders for Lovecraftian survival horror game sequel The Sinking City 2 are now available, developer Frogwares announced. It is priced at $49.99 / £41.35 / €49.99 for the standard edition .

“Seeing pre-orders go live is quite a surreal milestone for us,” said Frogwares publishing director Sergiy Oganesyan in a press release. “It means the game is basically at the finish line, and that’s not something we were always sure would happen. The Sinking City 2 is the most ambitious game we’ve ever made, built under circumstances most studios never have to plan for by a team working remotely across Ukraine and beyond. Even now, with around two months till launch to go, we made the call to move the entire project over to Unreal Engine 5.8 because we believed the performance gains were wo...
